title: Meowpack
description: A lightweight-ish highly Create focused modpack
body:
# Meow Meow I Will Meow At You Pack
...or MMIWMAYPack, also known as Meowpack, is a highly Create focused pack mainly made for the members of MeowSMP (previously PyonSMP), which aims to be both performant, lightweight and balanced, while still including Create and some addons. This is in no way a vanilla-style modpack, but still aims to be sort of vanilla-style with QoL improvements and cool additions, where possible.

## Notes
While this pack was made for MeowSMP members, you can download this map yourself. I test and make sure the pack stays fully playable, so you don't have to worry about it, as you often do with NeoForge unfortunately.

I use the [Complimentary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) shader, modified by on start up [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) to make it more compatible with mods used in the pack.

The modpack uses datapacks made by [0xDED](https://modrinth.com/user/0xDED), but modifies them to make them work and load automatically with KubeJS.
## Troubleshooting
### Placing a boat crashed my game
Nature's Spirit breaks boats. Try using only modded ones. Sadly this is out of my reach to fix.

### I see random lines
Flywheel has defaulted to indirect mode.

Do 
`
/flywheel backend flywheel:off
`
if you're not using shaders.
 
Do `/flywheel backend irisflw:iris_instancing` instead if you're using shaders.


## Source
~~Source is inlcuded in every release as the "meowpack-x.x-pwfs.zip" file, until I start hosting the source on github.~~ Source is hosted on github.

The pack is made using [packwiz](https://github.com/packwiz/packwiz).
